goal: Add a side-effect-free evidence pack for BPK-072 memory cache audit export preview dry-runs, preserving preview lines and evidence refs without writing files, durable storage, DB, filesystem cache, scheduler, routes, package, workflow, deployment, or external-call changes.
scope_out: Do not write export files, add durable storage, DB writes, filesystem cache files, scheduler, routes, package changes, workflow changes, deployment files, or external calls.
claims: Audit export preview evidence can be bundled without writing files.
Ready BPK-072 render dry-run and evidence refs are required.
assumptions: Actual export persistence would be a later task.
dod: Ready, missing evidence ref, and blocked render dry-run cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: File writes, durable storage, DB, filesystem cache, scheduler, route, package, workflow, deployment, or external-call changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-072 rendered memory cache audit export previews without writing files.
